title: encode_receipt (osaka-blocks)
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB

    [*] --> q_init : start
    q_init --> q_check_access : isinstance(tx, AccessListTransaction)
    q_check_access --> q_return_access : tx is AccessListTransaction
    q_check_access --> q_check_feemarket : tx is not AccessListTransaction
    q_return_access --> q_final : return b"\x01" + rlp.encode(receipt)
    q_check_feemarket --> q_return_feemarket : tx is FeeMarketTransaction
    q_check_feemarket --> q_check_blob : tx is not FeeMarketTransaction
    q_return_feemarket --> q_final : return b"\x02" + rlp.encode(receipt)
    q_check_blob --> q_return_blob : tx is BlobTransaction
    q_check_blob --> q_check_setcode : tx is not BlobTransaction
    q_return_blob --> q_final : return b"\x03" + rlp.encode(receipt)
    q_check_setcode --> q_return_setcode : tx is SetCodeTransaction
    q_check_setcode --> q_return_legacy : tx is LegacyTransaction
    q_return_setcode --> q_final : return b"\x04" + rlp.encode(receipt)
    q_return_legacy --> q_final : return receipt
    q_final --> [*] : done

    note right of q_check_access
        INV: Transaction type must be one of AccessListTransaction,
        FeeMarketTransaction, BlobTransaction, SetCodeTransaction,
        or LegacyTransaction
    end note

    note right of q_return_access
        INV: Receipt encoding prefix byte corresponds to
        transaction type (0x01=AccessList, 0x02=FeeMarket,
        0x03=Blob, 0x04=SetCode)
    end note

    note right of q_return_legacy
        INV: LegacyTransaction receipts are not
        RLP-wrapped (returned as-is)
